title: Zigbang: A Hybrid API of Serverless and ECS, Infra as a Code via CDK

description:
Zigbang is a real estate brokerage application with ~50% market share in Korea. In a sudden spike in traffic caused by online and mobile ads, learn how Zigbang is handling the traffic by using AWS Serverless services and Amazon ECS in a hybrid manner as well as utilizing the AWS CDK (Cloud Development Kit).

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: Zigbang: A Hybrid API of Serverless and ECS, Infra as a Code via CDK
